text:
The 288 th Hunter Exam was held on January 7 th , Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 147 2000, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 146 while Biscuit Krueger and Gon Freecss trained inside Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 148 The exam site was in Beeskafmarro, Diksakura store (basement) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 66 (2011) by the station and the only graduating participant was Killua Zoldyck.

Killua Zoldyck (examinee #1219)

Amori (#127)

1478 other examinees

Examiners

First Phase

288th Hunter Exam's 1 st Phase Examiner

Trivia

This is the last Hunter Exam that occurred while Netero was alive.

Anime and Manga Differences

Some characters do not appear in the anime adaptations of the exam.
In the 1999 anime adaptation, Zepile never partakes the exam. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 80 (1999) 
In the 2011 anime adaptation, Kenmi, Sommy, Kyu, and Todo do not participate or are not shown. 
Regarding the Hunter examinees' badge numbers of the known characters:
In the manga, only Killua's examinee number (#1219) is revealed; 
In the 1999 anime adaptation, besides Killua's number, Amori's (#83), Imori's (#81), and Umori's (#82) numbers are also displayed; 
and, in the 2011 anime adaptation, besides Killua's number, Tonpa's (#36), Amori's (#127), Imori's (#128), Umori's (#129), Ponzu's (#233), and Zepile's (#1100) numbers are shown too. 
The Amori Brothers' badge numbers differ between anime adaptations.
While in the manga and 2011 anime adaptation, Netero allows Killua to pass the exam without the need for a Second Phase via cellphone, in the 1999 anime adaptation he is present at the exam site or goes there to give the permission.
